mapper.select:
SELECT n.notice_seq ,n.title ,n.view_count ,n.top_yn ,n.use_yn ,u.name AS rgst_user_name ,n.created_at AS rgst_date_time FROM event.notice n LEFT JOIN event.users u ON u.user_seq = n.created_by
n.deleted_at IS NULL
AND n.title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY n.top_yn DESC, n.created_at DESC

SELECT notice_seq ,title ,content ,view_count ,top_yn ,use_yn ,file_seq ,created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,created_at AS rgst_date_time ,updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,updated_at AS upt_date_time FROM event.notice WHERE notice_seq = #{noticeSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO event.notice (title, content, top_yn, use_yn, file_seq, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{topYn}, #{useYn}, #{fileSeq}, #{rgstUserSeq}, #{uptUserSeq})
mapper.update: UPDATE event.notice SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ,updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE notice_seq = #{noticeSeq}
UPDATE event.notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE notice_seq = #{noticeSeq} AND deleted_at IS NULL
